basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details and relaxation criteria.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (6 CGPA or 60% and above), M.Sc. (Mathematics) (6 CGPA or 60% and above), GATE (Top 100), NET (JRF), Ph.D degree in Number Theory
qualification.details: Research Associate - I: B.Sc. (6 CGPA or 60% and above), M.Sc. (Mathematics) (6 CGPA or 60% and above), qualified GATE (Top 100), NET (JRF) and Ph.D degree with good research background in Number Theory.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Delhi Research Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Research Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Research Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications via email for the IIT Delhi Research Associate - I position is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate - I post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification includes a B.Sc. degree with at least 6 CGPA or 60% marks, an M.Sc. in Mathematics with at least 6 CGPA or 60% marks, and a Ph.D. degree in Number Theory. Additionally, candidates must have qualified GATE (Top 100) or NET (JRF).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000/- per month, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) at the rate of 27%.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Delhi Research Associate - I job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to prepare their application with complete bio-data and attach self-attested copies of required documents, then send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the provided information.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any specific details regarding the selection procedure.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Research Associate - I position at IIT Delhi is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates belonging to reserved categories should refer to the official notification for information on age relaxation policies.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the provided link in the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
